configurations.name: Plain Text (Regex)
configurations.description: Plain Text Filter using regex-based linebreak search. Detects a wider range of linebreaks at the price of lower speed and extra memory usage.

configurations.name: Plain Text (Regex, Line=Paragraph)
configurations.description: Plain Text Filter using regex-based linebreak search. Extracts by lines.
configurations.parametersRaw:
#v1
unescapeSource.b=true
trimLeading.b=false
trimTrailing.b=false
preserveWS.b=true
useCodeFinder.b=false
codeFinderRules=#v1$0a$count.i=2$0a$rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn]$0a$rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v$0a$sample=$0a$useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false
wrapMode.i=0
rule=(^(?=.+))(.*?)$
sourceGroup.i=2
regexOptions.i=8
sample=$0d$$0a$This is the first sentence. And this is the second one.$0d$$0a$Second paragraph. Each one ends at the line-break.$0d$$0a$$0d$$0a$Third paragraph.$0d$$0a$And the last paragraph may have no line-break.
parametersClass=net.sf.okapi.filters.plaintext.regex.Parameters

parameters.sample: $0d$$0a$This is the first sentence. And this is the second one.$0d$$0a$Second paragraph. Each one ends at the line-break.$0d$$0a$$0d$$0a$Third paragraph.$0d$$0a$And the last paragraph may have no line-break.

configurations.name: Plain Text (Regex, Block=Paragraph)
configurations.description: Plain Text Filter using regex-based linebreak search. Extracts by paragraphs.
configurations.parametersRaw:
#v1
unescapeSource.b=true
trimLeading.b=false
trimTrailing.b=false
preserveWS.b=true
useCodeFinder.b=false
codeFinderRules=#v1$0a$count.i=2$0a$rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn]$0a$rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v$0a$sample=$0a$useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=false
wrapMode.i=0
rule=(\n*)(.*?)(\n\n|\Z)
sourceGroup.i=2
regexOptions.i=40
sample=$0d$$0a$This is the first sentence. And this is the second one.$0d$$0a$Second paragraph. Each one ends at the line-break.$0d$$0a$$0d$$0a$Third paragraph.$0d$$0a$And the last paragraph may have no line-break.
parametersClass=net.sf.okapi.filters.plaintext.regex.Parameters

parameters.sample: $0d$$0a$This is the first sentence. And this is the second one.$0d$$0a$Second paragraph. Each one ends at the line-break.$0d$$0a$$0d$$0a$Third paragraph.$0d$$0a$And the last paragraph may have no line-break.

inlineCodes.title: Inline Codes
inlineCodes.description: Pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text.

sample.default:
This is the first sentence. And this is the second one.
Second paragraph. Each one ends at the line-break.

Third paragraph.
And the last paragraph may have no line-break.

enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.)

rules.description: Regex patterns to identify inline codes in translatable text

mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable)

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
